Package org.eventb.core.pog.state

Interface IHypothesisManager

All Superinterfaces:
IPOGState, IState, Iterable<FreeIdentifier>
All Known Subinterfaces:
IContextHypothesisManager, IEventHypothesisManager, IMachineHypothesisManager
All Known Implementing Classes:
ContextHypothesisManager, EventHypothesisManager, HypothesisManager, MachineHypothesisManager
public interface IHypothesisManager extends IPOGState, Iterable<FreeIdentifier>
Hypotheses in a PO file are arranged in a tree structure. Hypothesis managers are used to anticipate and create this structure. The hypotheses of each manegers from a list. Often, there is more than one hypothesis manager. In that case these hypothesis managers form a tree: the hypotheses tree of the PO file. Hypothesis managers are plugged together by means of root hypotheses and full hypotheses that refer to the hypothesis sets immediately preceding the hypotheses list of a hypothesis manager and to the last hypothesis in this list.

Hypotheses are represented by predicate sets. Each predicate set may be associated with a type environment which is represented by a set of typed identifiers. When the predicate sets of this manager are created, the type environment associated with this manager is added to the first predicate set created (the one that is included in all other predicate sets of this manager). The identifiers of this manager can be accessed via the Iterable interface it implements.

Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IPOPredicateSet
    getFullHypothesis()
    Returns a handle to the predicate set that contains all predicates managed by this manager.
    IRodinElement
    getParentElement()
    Returns the parent element from which the hypothesis are taken.
    IPOPredicate
    getPredicate(ISCPredicateElement element)
    Returns a handle to a PO predicate of this hypothesis manager, or null if the predicate element passed as parameter is not among the predicates managed by this hypothesis manager.
    IPOPredicateSet
    getRootHypothesis()
    Returns a handle to the root predicate set of this hypothesis set.
    IPOPredicateSet
    makeHypothesis(ISCPredicateElement element)
    Returns the name for the hypothesis set of a predicate element.

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.tool.IState

    getStateType, isImmutable, makeImmutable

    Methods inherited from interface java.lang.Iterable

    forEach, iterator, spliterator

  • Method Details

    • getParentElement

      IRodinElement getParentElement()
      Returns the parent element from which the hypothesis are taken. This can be, e.g., an SC context file, an SC machine file, or an SC event.
      Returns:
      the parent element from which the hypothesis are taken

    • makeHypothesis

      IPOPredicateSet makeHypothesis(ISCPredicateElement element) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the name for the hypothesis set of a predicate element. When this method has been called the hypothesis set for for the predicate element is created. It will be saved to the PO file when createHypotheses() is called. If this method is not called for a particular predicate element the corresponding hypothesis set is not created.
      Parameters:
      element - the predicate element for which a hypothesis set is required
      Returns:
      the name of the hypothesis set
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if this hypthesis manager is immutable

    • getPredicate

      IPOPredicate getPredicate(ISCPredicateElement element) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns a handle to a PO predicate of this hypothesis manager, or null if the predicate element passed as parameter is not among the predicates managed by this hypothesis manager.

      This requires that the hypothesis manager is immutable.

      Using this method PO predicate sets in the PO file can be referenced before they are created.

      Parameters:
      element - the predicate element corresponding to the predicate
      Returns:
      a handle to the predicate in the PO file corresponding to the predicate element passed as the parameter
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if this hypothesis manager is mutable

    • getFullHypothesis

      IPOPredicateSet getFullHypothesis()
      Returns a handle to the predicate set that contains all predicates managed by this manager.
      Returns:
      a handle to the predicate set that contains all predicates managed by this manager

    • getRootHypothesis

      IPOPredicateSet getRootHypothesis()
      Returns a handle to the root predicate set of this hypothesis set. This is the predicate set contained in all hypotheses of this manager.
      Returns:
      a handle to the root predicate set of this hypothesis set
